mistral-ocr-2512.pricingNotes: Mistral OCR is listed at $2 per 1,000 pages. Free credits, discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: No Mistral OCR file-size or page-count limits were found in project/links/all-all-links.md.

glm-ocr.pricingNotes: Z.AI lists GLM OCR token pricing at $0.03/1M input tokens and $0.03/1M output tokens. OCR estimates multiply observed or heuristic token usage by these rates; cache discounts, batch discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: project/links/glm-all-links.md documents GLM OCR input caps of 10 MB per image, 50 MB per PDF, and a maximum of 100 pages.

kimi.description: Moonshot AI Kimi OCR via vision chat

kimi-k2.6.description: Kimi K2.6 OCR via multimodal Chat Completions
kimi-k2.6.pricingTier: Moonshot AI public API token pricing
kimi-k2.6.pricingNotes: Moonshot AI public pricing lists Kimi K2.6 at $0.95/1M input tokens and $4/1M output tokens. OCR estimates use cache-miss input pricing conservatively; cache discounts, batch discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: project/links/kimi-general-ocr-text-links.md documents Kimi image support for PNG/JPEG/WebP/GIF, a 100 MB request-body/file limit, and recommended image resolution no higher than 4K. AutoShow renders PDFs to page images before calling Kimi OCR.

openai.description: OpenAI GPT OCR via Responses API

gpt-5.5.pricingNotes: OpenAI lists GPT-5.5 Standard pricing with short-context rates of $5/1M input tokens, $0.50/1M cached input tokens, and $30/1M output tokens. For prompts with >272K input tokens, OpenAI applies 2x input and 1.5x output pricing for the full session. OCR estimates switch bands from observed or heuristic input tokens; batch, flex, priority, regional uplifts, cached-input discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: project/links/openai-all-links.md documents OpenAI file-input limits of 50 MB per file and 50 MB total across all files in a request. Image-input docs document PNG, JPEG, WEBP, and non-animated GIF support with request-level payload limits.

gpt-5.4.pricingNotes: OpenAI lists GPT-5.4 Standard pricing with short-context rates of $2.50/1M input tokens, $0.25/1M cached input tokens, and $15/1M output tokens. For prompts with >272K input tokens, OpenAI applies 2x input and 1.5x output pricing for the full session. OCR estimates switch bands from observed or heuristic input tokens; batch, flex, priority, regional uplifts, cached-input discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: project/links/openai-all-links.md documents OpenAI file-input limits of 50 MB per file and 50 MB total across all files in a request. Image-input docs document PNG, JPEG, WEBP, and non-animated GIF support with request-level payload limits.

gpt-5.4-mini.pricingNotes: OpenAI lists GPT-5.4 Mini at $0.75/1M input tokens and $4.50/1M output tokens. OCR estimates multiply observed token usage by these published rates; free credits, batch/flex discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: project/links/openai-all-links.md documents OpenAI file-input limits of 50 MB per file and 50 MB total across all files in a request. Image-input docs document PNG, JPEG, WEBP, and non-animated GIF support with request-level payload limits.

gpt-5.4-nano.pricingNotes: OpenAI lists GPT-5.4 nano at $0.20/1M input tokens and $1.25/1M output tokens. OCR estimates multiply observed token usage by these published rates; free credits, batch/flex discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: project/links/openai-all-links.md documents OpenAI file-input limits of 50 MB per file and 50 MB total across all files in a request. Image-input docs document PNG, JPEG, WEBP, and non-animated GIF support with request-level payload limits.

grok.description: xAI Grok OCR via vision chat

grok-4.3.description: Grok 4.3 OCR via multimodal Chat Completions
grok-4.3.pricingTier: xAI public Chat API token pricing
grok-4.3.pricingNotes: xAI lists Grok 4.3 at $1.25/1M input tokens, $0.20/1M cached input tokens, and $2.50/1M output tokens. OCR estimates use standard listed rates and emit a pricing note when observed or estimated input context exceeds 200K tokens. Batch discounts, cached-input discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: docs.x.ai documents Grok 4.3 image input support for PNG/JPG/JPEG with a 20 MiB maximum image size. AutoShow renders PDF pages to PNG images before calling Grok OCR.

higherContextPricing.note: xAI public pricing lists a 1M-context Grok 4.3 table but does not provide separate numeric higher-context rates. This estimate uses standard listed rates and may understate cost if a higher-context tier is applied.

anthropic.description: Anthropic Claude OCR via Messages API

claude-opus-4-7.pricingNotes: Anthropic lists Claude Opus 4.7 at $5/1M input tokens and $25/1M output tokens. OCR estimates multiply observed token usage by these published rates; prompt caching, batch discounts, fast mode, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: project/links/claude-all-links.md documents standard unencrypted PDF support, image support for JPEG/PNG/GIF/WebP up to 5 MB each, Messages/Token Counting requests up to 32 MB, Files API uploads up to 500 MB, and uploaded files persist until deleted. AutoShow Anthropic OCR chunks PDFs into 10-page Files API uploads and rejects encrypted/password-protected PDFs.

claude-sonnet-4-6.pricingNotes: Anthropic lists Claude Sonnet 4.6 at $3/1M input tokens and $15/1M output tokens. OCR estimates multiply observed token usage by these published rates; prompt caching, batch discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: project/links/claude-all-links.md documents standard unencrypted PDF support, image support for JPEG/PNG/GIF/WebP up to 5 MB each, Messages/Token Counting requests up to 32 MB, Files API uploads up to 500 MB, and uploaded files persist until deleted. AutoShow Anthropic OCR chunks PDFs into 10-page Files API uploads and rejects encrypted/password-protected PDFs.

limits.notes: project/links/claude-all-links.md documents standard unencrypted PDF support, image support for JPEG/PNG/GIF/WebP up to 5 MB each, Messages/Token Counting requests up to 32 MB, Files API uploads up to 500 MB, and uploaded files persist until deleted. AutoShow Anthropic OCR chunks PDFs into 10-page Files API uploads and rejects encrypted/password-protected PDFs.

gemini-3.1-pro-preview.pricingNotes: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview Standard pricing is $2/1M input tokens and $12/1M output tokens for prompts up to 200K tokens, and $4/1M input tokens and $18/1M output tokens for prompts over 200K tokens. OCR estimates switch bands from observed or heuristic input tokens; free tier, batch/flex/priority prices, context caching, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: project/links/gemini-all-links.md documents inline PDF input up to 50 MB, inline non-PDF payloads up to 100 MB, Files API uploads up to 2 GB per file, and document understanding up to 1000 PDF pages.

limits.notes: project/links/gemini-all-links.md documents inline PDF input up to 50 MB, inline non-PDF payloads up to 100 MB, Files API uploads up to 2 GB per file, and document understanding up to 1000 PDF pages.

Qwen/Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Instruct.description: Qwen3 VL 235B A22B Instruct via DeepInfra
Qwen/Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Instruct.pricingNotes: DeepInfra lists Qwen/Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Instruct at $0.20/1M input tokens, $0.11/1M cached input tokens, and $0.88/1M output tokens. OCR estimates use non-cached token rates; discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: DeepInfra Vision & OCR docs document OpenAI vision API format, supported image uploads as JPG/PNG/WebP, 20 MB maximum image size, and no detail parameter support. AutoShow renders PDF and EPUB-derived PDF pages to PNG images before calling DeepInfra OCR.

Qwen/Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Instruct.pricingNotes: DeepInfra lists Qwen/Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Instruct at $0.15/1M input tokens and $0.60/1M output tokens. OCR estimates use these public rates; discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: DeepInfra Vision & OCR docs document OpenAI vision API format, supported image uploads as JPG/PNG/WebP, 20 MB maximum image size, and no detail parameter support. AutoShow renders PDF and EPUB-derived PDF pages to PNG images before calling DeepInfra OCR.
Defuddle runs locally and has no third-party API billing.

firecrawl.description: Firecrawl /scrape markdown extraction estimated at the Standard plan effective credit rate
firecrawl.pricingNotes: Firecrawl Standard is $83/month for 100,000 credits and /scrape uses 1 credit/page for the base markdown scrape. The estimate is a base/reference heuristic because advanced formats, enhanced mode, agents, browser actions, and other options can consume extra credits. Free credits, annual discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: No Firecrawl article-extraction file-size or page-count limits were found in project/links/all-all-links.md.

glm-reader.description: Z.AI GLM Reader hosted article extraction
GLM Reader URL-to-markdown extraction estimated from Z.AI built-in web tool per-use pricing
glm-reader.pricingTier: Z.AI built-in web tool reference pricing
glm-reader.pricingNotes: GLM Reader estimates use the Z.AI built-in web-search/tool reference of $0.01 per use as a per-page/request heuristic. Provider-specific quote paths, free quotas, discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: Z.AI publishes built-in Web Search at $0.01/use; GLM Reader-specific request pricing was not listed in the local docs.

spider.pricingNotes: Spider pricing can depend on scrape mode, compute, and bandwidth. AutoShow keeps a conservative base/reference per-page heuristic for dry-run totals; free credits, discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: Spider publishes usage billing based on bandwidth and compute rather than a fixed per-page scrape price. AutoShow uses a conservative heuristic per-page estimate for dry-run totals.

supadata.description: Supadata Web Reader /web/scrape extraction at 1 credit per request using the Basic/Pro auto-recharge rate ($10 / 1,000 credits)
supadata.pricingNotes: Supadata lists 1 URL scrape as 1 credit. The default reference rate is Basic/Pro auto-recharge at $10 per 1,000 credits. Free plan credits, yearly discounts, larger-plan auto-recharge rates, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: Supadata Web Reader charges 1 credit per scrape request. Actual plan pricing can differ from the reference auto-recharge rate.

zyte.description: Zyte article automatic extraction add-on estimate; base request tier costs may also apply
zyte.pricingNotes: Zyte lists automatic extraction at $0.0004-$0.0016 per data type before discounts, while base request tiers, bandwidth, actions, screenshots, and selected features can add cost. AutoShow uses the $0.0016 upper-bound extraction add-on as a base/reference heuristic and excludes variable base request costs, free credits, discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits.

limits.notes: Zyte lists automatic extraction at $0.0004-$0.0016 per data type before volume discounts; article extraction uses the upper bound here and excludes variable base request tier costs.

unstructured.description: Unstructured hosted document OCR and partitioning

hi_res_and_enrichment.pricingNotes: Pay-As-You-Go flat rate is $0.03/page; free Let's Go allowance may apply before billing, and Business pricing is custom.

limits.notes: Unstructured on-demand jobs support local files up to 10 MB. AutoShow estimates Pay-As-You-Go pricing at $0.03/page; free allowance or custom Business pricing may differ.
